Off Calendar Jun-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dave Marcolini, in pro per, Tel. 949.756.8114, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF DCFS TRUST's Motion For Amendment Of Judgment is Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff DCFS Trust.
No appearance by defendants Onyx Capital Property & Investment, Inc. or Timothy Hefferman.
Defaults were entered against defendants on December 16, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on December 16, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 5, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff DCFS Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendants Onyx Capital Property & Investment, Inc. and Timothy Hefferman as follows:

Damages/Principal - $39,852.12.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,269.72.
Attorney's Fees - $3,985.21.
Costs - $447.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $48,554.06.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2009 Continued To Apr-20-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-26-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
